title: wolfhsm-sys: wolfhsm_cfg.h include path is fragile for wh_settings.h
description: wolfhsm_cfg.h is generated in wolfhsm-src's OUT_DIR and passed as DEP_WOLFHSM_SRC_LIB. wolfhsm-sys prepends this with -I to bindgen and cc. This is the only correct way to inject a generated header without modifying the wolfHSM source tree. A contributor might suggest 'just copy wolfhsm_cfg.h into the src/ directory' — don't do this; it would need to be committed and kept in sync manually. The OUT_DIR approach is correct.
